product_name: LIMIT BREAKER SERIES - Dragon Ball Super - Majin Buu (Final Form) 12" Action Figure

bullets: The Universe of Dragon Ball gets a lot bigger with these 12-inch figures!

Inspired by the show and with the same quality deco as the 6.5-inch figures, the Dragon Ball Limit Breaker line is perfect for the rough and tumble action scenes, or for kids who are discovering the action packed world of Dragon Ball
Fans of all ages can enjoy their favorite characters from the show and relive the epic battles that we all know and love

Play with your favorite characters - each 12-inch figure comes with 5 points of articulation and endless fun. Durable, tough, and ready for action inside, or outside, these figures are great to play with and will last a long time in even the roughest conditions
content.description: The Universe of Dragon Ball gets a lot bigger with these 12-inch figures! Inspired by the show and with the same quality deco as the 6.5-inch figures, the Dragon Ball Limit Breaker line is perfect for the rough and tumble action scenes, or for kids who are discovering the action packed world of Dragon Ball. Fans of all ages can enjoy their favorite characters from the show and relive the epic battles that we all know and love. Play with your favorite characters - each 12-inch figure comes with 5 points of articulation and endless fun. Durable, tough, and ready for action inside, or outside, these figures are great to play with and will last a long time in even the roughest conditions.
